title: TASKSPEC
description: Machine-readable task specification for dispatch and execution. TaskSpecs MUST NOT be Markdown-only; they must contain structured fields that automation can read.

inputs.description: Input files and data required for this task.

allowed_actions.description: List of actions allowed during this task. Must be explicit.

forbidden_actions.description: List of actions forbidden during this task. Includes by default: delete, move, rename, clean worktree, overwrite evidence, fabricate baseline.

required_outputs.description: List of output files that must exist for the task to be considered complete.

review_required.description: Does this task require a review gate?

review_by.description: Who must review this task's output.

next_on_accepted.description: What to do if the task is accepted. E.g., stage name, task ID, or terminal.

next_on_blocked.description: What to do if the task is blocked.

next_on_human_required.description: What to do if human input is required.

allowed_terminal_reasons.description: Only these reasons allow terminal=true: accepted_done, human_required, blocked_unresolvable, technical_failure, max_rounds_reached, high_risk_required

terminal_conditions.description: When terminal=false, the task MUST be consumed by a runner. true only for terminal states.

high_risk.description: If true, human_required must be triggered before execution.
